prompt: Monochromatic logo wordmark on pure black background. The text 'MM AGENCY.' in a single horizontal line, all uppercase, all in solid pure white (#FFFFFF) including the period dot. CRITICAL: The ENTIRE text uses ONE SINGLE typeface — a bold, blocky, geometric extended sans-serif like Microgramma Extended Bold. Every letter is the SAME font, same weight, same style. Wide rectangular letterforms, thick strokes, sharp 90-degree corners. Everything is pure white on black — no yellow, no gray, no color at all. Monochromatic. No icon, no symbol. Pure heavy typography centered on black. Vector quality, crisp edges, completely flat.
